coastal.title: Tsleil-Waututh Nation files court challenge against Burrard Inlet dredging plan
coastal.description: The dredging work near the Second Narrows Bridge would allow oil tankers travelling to Trans Mountain's Burnaby terminal to carry more oil.

cariboo.title: Fraser Canyon wildfires continue to threaten residents, property
cariboo.description: The Ainslie Creek fire is now estimated to be more than 15,500 hectares in size, and the Brunswick Creek fire across the river is now at an estimated 2,600 hectares.

all.title: ‘Extraordinarily rare’ dolphin sightings reported in B.C.’s waters
all.description: Video shot in Esperanza Inlet on the northwest coast of Vancouver Island captured an extremely rare sighting of a long-beaked common dolphin.
